content.en:
Bang!!!

The power of the Endless Extreme Dao in Ye Tian's body and the power of the other Extreme Dao were all around, and the power of the Endless Extreme Dao Body exploded, causing the Extreme Dao Body to begin to transform.

The breakthrough of other half-step perfect masters is to condense the perfect ancestor, for them, it is very good to condense the high-level perfect ancestor, and the ultimate goal of the ordinary half-step perfect master of the Extreme Creation Realm is to condense the super-perfect ancestor, so that they can hope to become the super-perfect master.

And Ye Tian was condensing the Endless Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestor at the moment, far surpassing the ordinary Extreme Dao Ancestor, as for the Super Perfect Ancestor, it was not qualified to compare with Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestor.

With Ye Tian's background and realm, he easily broke the shackles of his physical body, and his extreme body began to transform into an extreme ancestral body.

In an instant, endless origin energy began to pour into Ye Tian's body, helping him complete his transformation.

......

"Ye Tian's speed of absorbing energy is too fast!"

The Lord of Time was shocked.

As the sixth tower master of the Daoless Tower, his authority over the Daoless Tower is also very high, so he can sense the consumption rate of the origin energy in the Daoless Tower.

At this moment, he was very curious about how much Ye Tian's strength would improve after breaking through to the perfect controller.

Time passes slowly, a large amount of Origin Energy is consumed, and many resources are also depleted.

As a last resort, the high-level of the Wudao Tower once again urged the Wudao Tower to absorb more energy from the outside world.

It can be said that Ye Tian has absorbed the energy of the Wudao Tower again and again, and even overloaded the Wudao Tower, which has a certain impact on the Wudao Tower.

Soon, all the tower masters of the Daoless Tower appeared, and they were all shocked.

However, they were also very excited, the more energy Ye Tian absorbed, the greater the increase in strength after Ye Tian's breakthrough!

After a long time, Ye Tian absorbed enough energy, and the Extreme Dao Body finally transformed into the Extreme Dao Ancestral Body, and it was the Endless Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestral Body, and the physical body was terrified many times more terrifying than before.

Now.

Ye Tian felt that he could pinch his previous self to death with his hands, and he didn't need to use any extreme control techniques.

After the Endless Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestral Body was condensed, the next step was the condensation of the Extreme Dao Perfect Ancestral Power.

What other perfect controllers have in their bodies is perfect control, but what Ye Tian has is the Extreme Perfect Ancestral Power, which can also be called the Extreme Path Boost, which is above the Perfect Control.

And Ye Tian's Extreme Dao will has also been greatly improved, which is the benefit of breaking through the Great Realm.

Ye Tian continued to break through, and the power in his body gradually transformed into the Extreme Dao Ancestral Power, replacing the previous half-step control power of the Extreme Dao.

After a long time, Ye Tiancai officially broke through to the perfect controller.

After breaking through, Ye Tian returned to his own branch tower, and then continued to cultivate, this period of time was the fastest time to improve the power of the Extreme Dao Ancestor.

In terms of combat effectiveness, he had already reached the super-level perfect master, but in terms of cultivation, he had not yet arrived.

However, the speed at which his current Extreme Dao Ancestral Power was increasing was too fast.

Hoist!

Hoist!

Hoist!

Every once in a while, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Ancestral Power would have to skyrocket, and his cultivation would rise slowly, without a single bottleneck.

Other Perfect Controllers are still shackled by the bottlenecks of Medium Perfect Controllers, Advanced Perfect Controllers, and Super Perfect Controllers, but he doesn't have this problem.

The high-level officials of the Wudao Pagoda also knew that Ye Tian was cultivating, so they didn't come to disturb, and there was no need to rush about the celebration now.

Tens of millions of eternal years have passed, and Ye Tian is finally out of the customs.

After almost exhausting the resources of his whole body, his cultivation had finally been raised to the realm of a super-perfect master.

......

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

"Congratulations to the Endless Lord!"

One by one, the perfect controllers congratulated Ye Tian after he left the customs.

The Lord of Time and other super-perfect controllers also came, and they congratulated one after another.

At this moment, the perfect controllers of the Three Realms of the Daoless Tower appeared.

These perfect controllers of the Three Realms are usually in penance, almost never appearing, and they don't care about the affairs of the Daoless Tower, which is very mysterious, but they also appear at this moment.

The Lord of Tower No. 4, the perfect controller of the Void Realm, the Lord of Axe Mountain.

The Lord of the Fifth Tower, the Master of the Heavenly River, the perfect controller of the True Realm!

The Lord of Tower No. 7, the master of Luofu, the perfect controller of the real realm!

Tower No. 8 Lord, the perfect controller of the Void Realm, the Lord of the Bone!

.......

After Ye Tian learned about it, he knew that among the thirteen tower masters of the Wudao Tower, the Lord of Time was undoubtedly one of the worst, because the other tower masters had all reached the level of the perfect controller of the Void Realm.

Rumble!!!

The Perfect Masters of the Extreme Realm have appeared.

Tower No. 3 Lord Canggu, Tower No. 2 Lord Eternal Night, Tower No. 1 Lord Wudao, and Tower No. 10 Lord Sword Pole.

At this moment, Ye Tian knew that the Wudao Tower actually had four Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, and this kind of strength was already very good.

Although compared to the Ice Phoenix Island in the Extreme Deep Sea, the perfect controller of the Ice Phoenix Island may be much more than the Daoless Tower, but when it comes to the perfect controller of the Three Realms, the Wudao Tower can crush the Ice Phoenix Island by sending one at will.

"I've seen all the tower masters!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

At this time, the Lord of the Daoless Dao announced, "Lord of the Endless, you are already the Master of the Supreme Perfection, and I declare you the fourteenth Tower Master of the Daoless Tower. "

This announcement immediately stunned the other tower owners.

Immediately, the Lord of the Eighth Tower, the Lord of the Bone, frowned and said: "The Lord of the Daoless, the Lord of the Endless, has only broken through to the super-level perfect controller, and directly let him become the Lord of the Fourteenth Tower, I'm afraid it's a little inappropriate, right?"

"Yes, as soon as you break through, you will become the Lord of the Fourteenth Tower, what does this make the other super-perfect controllers of the Daoless Tower think? There are still eight super-perfect masters in the Daoless Tower, all of whom want to become the Lord of the Fourteenth Tower, but none of them have applied for it, and now it is given to the Lord of Endless, they are afraid that they will not be convinced!" said the Lord of the Heavenly River.

At this time, the Lord of Canggu said: "Because Ye Tian's strength is enough, he is almost invincible among the super perfect controllers. "

"Nearly invincible?"

The other tower owners frowned, isn't this evaluation too high!

There are so many super-perfect controllers in the end of the world, many of them are far beyond the master of time, and some of them can even severely damage or even kill the lord of time with a single blow.

What kind of strength dares to call it invincible?

"All the super perfect controllers of the Wudao Tower, including the Lord of Time, are fighting with Ye Tian, if Ye Tian wins, he will serve as the Lord of the Fourteenth Tower, do you have any opinions?"

The Lord of the Pathless asked.

"No comment!"

The Lord of the Heavenly River and the Lord of the Bone nodded one after another.

After all, the Lord of Time is already the Lord of the Sixth Tower, and if he is even more powerful than the Lord of Time, he is indeed qualified to be a Tower Master.

"I don't have an opinion either!"

Ye Tian said.

If you can serve as a tower master, there are still many benefits, such as entering the circle of the tower master, you can know more secrets and information.

Subsequently, the other super-perfect controllers were notified, and one by one they came.
